Compress, merge, split, convert, OCR, wa: Compress, merge, split, convert, OCR, watermark, protect and sign PDFs and images using iLovePDF / iLoveIMG / iLoveSign.
To get your project public key:

1. Sign up or log in at https://developer.ilovepdf.com/
2. Open your project on the developer dashboard
3. Copy the **Project public key** (starts with `project_public_`)
4. Paste it here

Only the public key is required. Tokens are issued automatically per request.
Reduce the size of a PDF file using iLov: Reduce the size of a PDF file using iLoveAPI.
Combine multiple PDF files into a single: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document, in the order provided.
Split a PDF by page ranges, fixed page b: Split a PDF by page ranges, fixed page batches, removed pages, or target file size.
Convert PDF pages to JPG images, or extr: Convert PDF pages to JPG images, or extract images embedded in the PDF.
Convert one or more images (JPG/PNG) int: Convert one or more images (JPG/PNG) into a PDF document.
Convert Office documents (DOCX, XLSX, PP: Convert Office documents (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, etc.) to PDF.
Convert a publicly accessible web page U: Convert a publicly accessible web page URL into a PDF.
Run OCR on a PDF to make scanned documen: Run OCR on a PDF to make scanned documents searchable. Supports 100+ languages.
Stamp a text or image watermark across p: Stamp a text or image watermark across pages of a PDF.
Add a password to a PDF document.
Remove the password from a PDF (you must: Remove the password from a PDF (you must know the current password).
Stamp page numbers onto a PDF, with cont: Stamp page numbers onto a PDF, with control over position and styling.
Rotate every page of a PDF by 90, 180, o: Rotate every page of a PDF by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
Extract plain or detailed text (with pos: Extract plain or detailed text (with positions and font metadata) from a PDF.
Attempt to fix a damaged or corrupted PD: Attempt to fix a damaged or corrupted PDF file.
Send one or more PDF documents for elect: Send one or more PDF documents for electronic signature, with custom signers and signature placeholders.
Look up the current status of a signatur: Look up the current status of a signature request, including each signer.
Email a reminder to signers who have not: Email a reminder to signers who have not yet completed the signature. Limited to 2 calls per day.
Cancel an in-progress signature request. The document becomes inaccessible to all signers.
Extend the expiration of a signature req: Extend the expiration of a signature request by a number of days. Total cannot exceed 130 days from now.
Download the signed PDF (or ZIP if multi: Download the signed PDF (or ZIP if multiple files). The signature must be in "completed" status.
Download the audit-trail PDF for a compl: Download the audit-trail PDF for a completed signature request. Useful for compliance and dispute resolution.
Merge results back into one PDF: Merge results back into one PDF
Output file name without extension. Use: Output file name without extension. Use {date}, {n} or {filename} placeholders.
Name of the ZIP archive when the result: Name of the ZIP archive when the result contains multiple files. No extension.
List of PDF files to merge. The output p: List of PDF files to merge. The output preserves the listed order.
Used with mode \"Page Ranges\". Example:: Used with mode "Page Ranges". Example: "1-5,7,10-13". Each range becomes a separate PDF.
Used with mode \"Fixed Range\". Number o: Used with mode "Fixed Range". Number of pages per output PDF (e.g. 1 splits into one PDF per page).
Used with mode \"Remove Pages\". Pages t: Used with mode "Remove Pages". Pages to delete, e.g. "2,4-6". The remaining pages stay in one PDF.
Used with mode \"By File Size\". Maximum: Used with mode "By File Size". Maximum size in megabytes per output PDF.
When enabled, merges the split outputs i: When enabled, merges the split outputs into a single PDF.
Images to include in the PDF, in order.
Page margin in pixels around each image. Default 0.
When enabled (default), produces one PDF: When enabled (default), produces one PDF for all images. When disabled, produces one PDF per image.
Supported formats include DOCX, XLSX, PP: Supported formats include DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, ODS, ODP, RTF, TXT.
Public URL of the web page to render as: Public URL of the web page to render as PDF.
ISO 639-2 language codes (e.g. eng, fra,: ISO 639-2 language codes (e.g. eng, fra, deu, spa, ita, por, rus, chi_sim, jpn, ara). Defaults to English.
Required when mode is \"Text\". The wate: Required when mode is "Text". The watermark text to stamp.
Required when mode is \"Image\". JPG/PNG: Required when mode is "Image". JPG/PNG image used as the watermark.
Pages to apply watermark to. Use \"all\": Pages to apply watermark to. Use "all", a single page, or ranges like "1-3,5".
Repeat the watermark across the entire p: Repeat the watermark across the entire page.
Place the watermark above or below the p: Place the watermark above or below the page content.
Password used to encrypt the PDF.
The current password protecting the PDF.
Pages to number. Use \"all\" or ranges l: Pages to number. Use "all" or ranges like "2-5,7". Defaults to all.
First page number to print. Defaults to: First page number to print. Defaults to 1.
When enabled, skips numbering the first: When enabled, skips numbering the first page.
Alternate horizontal position for left/r: Alternate horizontal position for left/right pages, like a printed book.
Use {n} for current page and {p} for tot: Use {n} for current page and {p} for total pages. Example: "{n} of {p}".
Include positional and font metadata for: Include positional and font metadata for each text block. Useful for downstream layout-aware parsing.
People who will receive the document.
Placeholders to drop on each PDF page. M: Placeholders to drop on each PDF page. Match them to signers by email. If empty, iLovePDF will let signers place fields freely.
Sender name shown in the email and signi: Sender name shown in the email and signing page.
Subject line for the signature invitatio: Subject line for the signature invitation email.
Body for the signature invitation email.
Days until the request expires. 1 to 130: Days until the request expires. 1 to 130. Default 120.
When enabled, signers receive the docume: When enabled, signers receive the document one at a time in the listed order.
Send reminder emails to signers who have: Send reminder emails to signers who have not yet signed.
Apply a certified-signature seal to the: Apply a certified-signature seal to the final PDF.
The \"token_requester\" returned when th: The "token_requester" returned when the signature request was created.
The \"token_requester\" of the signature: The "token_requester" of the signature request to void.
Number of days to add. Must be between 1: Number of days to add. Must be between 1 and 130.
The \"token_requester\" of the completed: The "token_requester" of the completed signature request.
Name to store the downloaded file under. Defaults to "signed-{token}.pdf".
Name to store the audit PDF under. Defau: Name to store the audit PDF under. Defaults to "audit-{token}.pdf".
Render each page as a JPG: Render each page as a JPG
Fires when a processing task finishes su: Fires when a processing task finishes successfully. Optionally filter by tool.
Fires when a processing task fails. Opti: Fires when a processing task fails. Optionally filter by tool.
Fires when a new signature request is cr: Fires when a new signature request is created.
Fires when a signature request is sent t: Fires when a signature request is sent to all receivers.
Fires when every signer has finished. Us: Fires when every signer has finished. Use this to drive contract-completion automations.
Fires when a signer or validator decline: Fires when a signer or validator declines the signature request.
Fires when a signature request reaches i: Fires when a signature request reaches its expiration date.
Fires when the requester cancels an in-p: Fires when the requester cancels an in-progress signature.
Fires when an individual receiver opens: Fires when an individual receiver opens the document.
Fires when an individual signer complete: Fires when an individual signer completes their signature.
Fires when an individual signer declines: Fires when an individual signer declines to sign.
\n**How to connect**\n\n1. Sign in to ht:
**How to connect**

1. Sign in to https://developer.ilovepdf.com/ and open your project.
2. Go to **Webhooks** and click **Add Webhook**.
3. Paste the URL below into **Endpoint URL**:

```text
{{webhookUrl}}
```

4. In **Events**, select **Task Completed (task.completed)**.
5. Save the webhook. The trigger will fire on every matching event.
Optional. When set, only fires for tasks: Optional. When set, only fires for tasks using one of the selected tools. Leave empty to fire for every tool.
